news.title: Gold Futures Flirt With Key $4,000 Price Level
news.summary: If the precious metal settles below $4,000, it would be the first time since November 2025, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  The fall in gold prices comes as U.S. Treasury yields tick higher and oil prices rise on reignited U.S.-Iran geopolitical tensions.  Higher oil prices fuel inflation worries and concerns that the Federal Reserve will have to raise interest rates.

news.title: Average 30-year US mortgage rate climbs to 6.55%, highest level in nearly a year
news.summary: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate climbed this week to its highest level in nearly a year, driving up borrowing costs for prospective homebuyers.  The benchmark 30-year fixed rate mortgage rate rose to 6.55% from 6.49% last week, mortgage buyer Freddie Mac said Thursday.  Higher mortgage rates can add hundreds of dollars a month in costs for borrowers, limiting homebuyers’ purchasing power at a time when affordability challenges continue to sideline many aspiring homeowners.
